title: Breadth-First Search (BFS) Algorithm Visualization
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of the BFS algorithm for traversing or searching tree or graph data structures.
relationships: Start node is placed in the queue and marked visited
Queue is processed in FIFO order
Current node is dequeued and checked
Unvisited neighbors are enqueued and marked visited
Process repeats until queue is empty or goal is found
